title: ilex aquifolium f. heterophylla
intro: Ilex aquifolium f. heterophylla, also known as the wintergreen holly, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the American holly plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ilex aquifolium f. heterophylla include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and boosting the immune system. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in herbal remedies for skin conditions and respiratory issues.
